---
name: Spec change
about: Propose a change to SPEC.md or the JSON Schemas (highest scrutiny — affects every implementation)
title: "[spec] "
labels: spec
---

## Change summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what would change. -->

## Section affected

<!-- Cite the SPEC.md section number(s), e.g. "§7.3 Reducer types"
     or "§8.2 Model B". -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is the current spec wrong / incomplete / ambiguous? Concrete
     examples preferred. -->

## Proposed wording

<!-- Optional but very helpful. The exact spec text you'd add/change. -->

## Impact on existing implementations

- [ ] Backward-compatible (existing impls keep working)
- [ ] Breaking change (would require a major version bump post-v1)
- [ ] Pre-v1 — breaking is fine

If breaking: who would need to update?

## Conformance test plan

<!-- For non-trivial changes: how would the conformance suite verify
     the new behavior? -->

## Reference implementation

- [ ] One of the reference impls already implements this
- [ ] An impl exists but is not yet merged
- [ ] No impl yet — spec change first, then code

## Discussion

<!-- Open questions, alternatives considered, prior art (MCP / OAuth /
     LangGraph / etc.). -->
